nasb.text: Like a man hired year by year he shall be with him; he shall not rule over him with severity in your sight.

esv.text: He shall treat him as a worker hired year by year. He shall not rule ruthlessly over him in your sight.

cnv.text: 買主要像每年雇用的工人那樣待他。不可在你眼前苛刻地管轄他。

ccb.text: 买主要待他如按年雇佣的工人。你们要确保买主不会苛待他。
